name: Unimol DockingV2
description: Chemically and quantitatively accurate small molecule docking with machine learning. Accurately predicting the binding poses of 77+% of ligands in the PoseBusters benchmark with an RMSD value of less than 2.0 Å, outperforming AlphaFold 3, AutoDock, and DiffDock.
capabilities: Chemically and quantitatively accurate small molecule docking with machine learning
Accurately predicting the binding poses of 77+% of ligands in the PoseBusters benchmark with an RMSD value of less than 2.0 Å, outperforming AlphaFold 3, AutoDock, and DiffDock

receptor.description: Receptor protein structure in PDB format

ligand_smiles.description: Alternative: ligand as SMILES string (conformer will be auto-generated)

pocket_center_x.description: X coordinate of the binding pocket center

pocket_center_y.description: Y coordinate of the binding pocket center

pocket_center_z.description: Z coordinate of the binding pocket center
